name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine peanut butter, sugar and egg (batter will be stiff).
2. Stir in chocolate chips.
3. Scoop level tablespoonfuls of the mixture and roll into balls.
4. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Flatten each ball with a fork.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-18 minutes, or until browned.
Yield: 2 dozen.
Note: This recipe does not use any flour.
